roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, & PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 02-07-22 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: 1150 MARKET ST, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/NP/PD/X: PROVISIONALLY APPOINTED/X: PER DEPUTY, DEFENDANT IS 4011,5 TODAY/CAUSE/BAIL: 50,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD: INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, & PLEA /TWA/DOPC/
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/NP/ /X: PER DEPUTY, DEFENDANT REFUSED TOTRANSPORT TO COURT TODAY/CAUSE/CONT/DOPC/
